segments.text: God takes his stand in the divine council; he renders judgment among the gods
segments.speaker: Narrator

segments.text: How long will you judge unjustly and show partiality to the wicked?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Give justice to the weak and the fatherless; maintain the right of the afflicted and the destitute
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Rescue the weak and the needy; deliver them from the hand of the wicked
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They have neither knowledge nor understanding, they walk about in darkness;
all the foundations of the earth are shaken
I said, 'You are gods, sons of the Most High, all of you'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Nevertheless, you shall die like men and fall like any one of the princes
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Arise, O God, judge the earth; for you shall inherit all the nations
segments.speaker: Psalmist
